loginStaffLink: Event staff? Sign in with your QR card →
authErrorInvalidCredentials: Incorrect email/code or password. Please try again.
authErrorServer: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
authErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
homeEmptyBody: Create your first event to start importing attendees and printing badges.
createEventDatesOrder: End date can't be before the start date.
createEventServerError: Couldn't create the event. Please try again.
placeholderComingSoon: This section is coming in a later phase.
workspaceOverviewSubtitle: Everything your team needs before doors open.
workspaceNextAttendees: Import your attendee list to start printing badges.
workspaceNextBadge: Design the badge template in the editor.
workspaceNextStaff: Assign staff and print their QR login cards.
workspaceNextEquipment: Connect the venue printer and run a test print.
workspaceAllReady: Everything's ready — launch check-in from the header when doors open.
workspaceUnlockHint: Finish the badge and run a test print to unlock check-in.
badgeAgentUnreachable: Can't reach the local print agent — plug it in and reopen this dialog to try again.
badgeTestPrintError: Couldn't send the test print. Try again.
badgeTestPrintGenerateError: Couldn't generate the badge for printing. Try again.
badgeTestPrintMissingFont: Font {{families}} is missing — fix the badge template before printing.
badgeZplPreviewError: Couldn't generate the ZPL preview. Try again.
badgeZplPreviewRasterError: This badge needs image rendering for Cyrillic or custom-font text, and this browser's canvas isn't available.
badgeZplPreviewCanvasUnavailable: The rendered preview isn't available in this browser.
badgeFontsNotReady: Some event fonts failed to load — this preview may use fallback glyphs.
badgePreviewMissingFont: Font {{families}} is missing — this preview may use fallback glyphs.
badgePreviewTrueRaster: True print pixels — this is exactly what prints.
badgeEmptyBody: This badge doesn't have any elements yet — {{width}} × {{height}} mm · {{dpi}} dpi. Add one from the panel on the left to get started.
badgeElementsEmpty: No elements yet — use + Add to create one.
badgeUnknownBinding: {{source}} isn't in this event's fields anymore
badgeCanvasApproximation: Preview approximation — print truth comes with the ZPL preview
badgePropsEmpty: Select an element to edit its properties, or set the label's overall size below.
badgePropsDocShrinkHint: Shrinking the label moves or resizes elements that no longer fit, so they always stay on the printed badge.
badgeBarcodeOverflow: This code is longer than fits as a readable barcode at this width. For long values (e.g. a UUID), use a QR element instead.
badgeConflictBody: Template changed on the server — review before overwriting.
badgeConflictReloadBody: Your local edits are discarded and replaced with the server's current template.
badgeConflictOverwriteBody: The server's current template is replaced with your local edits. The other version is lost.
badgeSaveError: Couldn't save the badge template. Try again.
badgeGuardBody: This badge template has unsaved changes. Choose what to do before continuing.
badgePreviewListError: Couldn't load attendees — showing sample data.
badgePreviewMissing: Empty for this attendee — no invented value shown.
settingsSaveError: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
settingsDatesCannotClear: Clearing a date isn't supported yet.
settingsFontsSubtitle: Custom fonts for badge templates — available in the editor's font picker for this event.
settingsFontsEmpty: No custom fonts yet — the badge editor uses the built-in font until you add one.
settingsFontRemoveBody: "{{name}}" disappears from the editor's font picker. Badges already printed are unaffected.
settingsFontRemoveError: Couldn't remove the font. Try again.
settingsFontLicense: You are fully responsible for font licensing. By uploading, you confirm you hold the rights to use this font for printing badges.
settingsApiKeysSubtitle: Integrate registration forms or your CRM — push attendees and read check-in status for this event.
settingsKeysEmpty: No API keys yet — create one to push attendees from your registration forms or CRM.
settingsKeyRevokeBody: Integrations using this key stop working immediately.
settingsKeyRevokeError: Couldn't revoke the key. Try again.
settingsKeyShownOnce: The full key is shown once at creation — store it safely. Revoking is immediate.
settingsKeyRevealWarning: This is the only time the key is shown.
settingsFieldsSubtitle: Custom fields collected for every attendee, in addition to name, email, company, and position.
settingsFieldsRemoveNote: Removing a field never deletes values already stored on attendees.
settingsFieldsDuplicateError: This name is already used by another field.
settingsFieldsReservedError: This name is reserved for a standard attendee field.
settingsGenerateCodesBody: Backfills a code for every attendee that doesn't have one. Existing codes are never changed.
settingsGenerateCodesError: Couldn't generate codes. Please try again.
settingsDeleteEventBody: Attendees, check-in history and the badge design — gone. Typed confirmation required.
settingsDeleteConfirmBody: Deletes all attendees, check-in history and the badge design. This cannot be undone.
settingsDeleteError: Couldn't delete the event. Please try again.
tenantSuspendedBody: Your events and attendee data are safe — nothing is deleted.
orgReadOnlyNotice: Only organization admins can edit these settings.
orgForbiddenError: Only organization admins can save changes.
attendeesEmptyBody: Import your guest list from a CSV, or add people one by one. Check-in can't open until someone is on the list.
attendeesSelectAllLabel: Select all attendees on this page
bulkDeleteConfirmBody: Their check-in history disappears with them. This cannot be undone.
bulkDeleteError: Some attendees couldn't be deleted. Try again.
bulkPrintUnreachable: Can't reach the local print agent.
bulkPrintTimeoutWarn: {{count}} timed out — those badges may still print; check the printer before re-running
bulkPrintNoCancelHint: Sending can't be cancelled — badges already sent to the printer will still print.
bulkPrintNoTemplate: This event doesn't have a badge template yet.
bulkPrintTemplateGone: The badge template is no longer available.
bulkPrintPartialBeforeNoTemplate: {{sent}} of {{total}} sent before the template became unavailable
bulkPrintPartialBeforeNoTemplateWithFail: {{sent}} of {{total}} sent — {{failed}} failed, {{notAttempted}} never attempted — before the template became unavailable
bulkPrintMissingFont: Font {{families}} is missing — fix the badge template before printing.
bulkPrintPartialBeforeMissingFont: {{sent}} of {{total}} sent before a missing font stopped the batch
addAttendeeNameRequired: Enter at least a first or last name.
addAttendeeServerError: Couldn't add the attendee. Try again.
drawerReprintUnreachable: Can't reach the local print agent.
drawerReprintConfirmBodyChoose: Choose a printer to print {{name}}'s badge.
drawerReprintNoTemplate: This event doesn't have a badge template yet.
drawerReprintMissingFont: Font {{families}} is missing — fix the badge template
drawerReprintError: Couldn't send the badge to the printer. Try again.
printNoCancelHint: Sending can't be cancelled — a badge already sent to the printer will still print.
printAgentTimeout: The print agent didn't respond. The badge may still print — check the printer before retrying.
drawerReprintMarkPrintedWarning: Sent to {{printer}}, but the printed count couldn't be updated.
drawerAddZoneError: Couldn't add that zone. Try again.
drawerRegenerateBody: The old code stops working immediately — reprint any badge that used it.
drawerDeleteBody: {{name}} and their check-in history disappear. This cannot be undone.
importWorkerNote: {{size}} · parsed in a worker, the UI never freezes
importEncodingHint: Wrong encoding shows instantly as mojibake — switch above and the preview re-renders.
importUnmappedWarning: Column unmapped — pick a field or confirm skipping it
importDuplicateMappingWarning: Some columns map to the same field or have a blank custom field name — fix the highlighted columns before importing.
importParseErrorWarning: This file has rows that don't match the header row's column count — fix the CSV and try again.
importValidCommitted: Valid rows are already in the list — fix these here or download them as CSV.
importProblemDuplicateEmail: Duplicate — same email as an existing attendee
importProblemDuplicateCode: Duplicate — same code as an existing attendee
importChunkFailed: Upload interrupted — {{count}} rows not sent yet.
zonesCaption: Optional — attendees always get the entrance zone.
zonesEmptyBody: Zones are optional — every attendee already gets the entrance zone. Add one to control access to VIP areas, workshops, or restricted spaces.
zonesFormServerError: Couldn't save the zone. Try again.
zonesDeleteConfirmBody: Access rules for this zone are removed too. This cannot be undone.
zonesDeleteError: Couldn't delete the zone. Please try again.
zonesRulesNoConditions: No conditions yet — everyone has access until you add one and save.
zonesRulesValidationHint: Fill in every condition and remove duplicates before saving.
zonesRulesDuplicateAdvanced: Already constrained by an advanced rule
zonesRulesServerError: Couldn't save the access rules. Try again.
zonesRulesUnsavedHint: Save or cancel your changes before editing another zone's rules.
staffCaption: Event-day access via QR login — no accounts, no passwords, minimal training.
staffPrintAllDisabledHint: Only admins can print QR cards.
staffEmptyBody: Add event-day staff to print their QR login cards — no accounts or passwords needed.
staffFooterNote: Admins & managers sign in with their own accounts — manage them in Team.
staffQrNotShown: QR was issued {{date}}. Codes can't be re-displayed — printing issues a new one.
staffAdminOnly: Only admins can generate or print QR codes.
staffRegenerateConfirmBody: A new code is issued — the previously printed card stops working.
staffRegenerateError: Couldn't generate the QR code. Try again.
staffPrintAllConfirmBody: {{count}} staff — all previously printed cards stop working.
staffAddNoCandidates: Every tenant user is already assigned to this event.
staffAddAssignError: Couldn't add the staff member. Try again.
staffAddPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
staffAddCreateError: Couldn't create the staff account. Try again.
staffAddAssignFailed: {{email}} was created, but couldn't be added to this event. Switch to the Existing tab and add them from there.
staffRevokeConfirmBody: {{email}} loses event-day access to this event. You can re-add them anytime.
staffZonesDialogLoadError: Couldn't load zones for this staff member.
staffZonesDialogEmpty: This event has no zones yet.
staffZonesToggleError: Couldn't update zone access. Try again.
checkinScanWedgeHint: Scan a badge to check in.
checkinScanScannerHint: Waiting for a scan from the handheld scanner…
checkinScanScannerDegradedHint: Can't reach the handheld scanner — use manual search below.
checkinScanScannerDegradedHintNoManualSe: Can't reach the handheld scanner. Ask a colleague for help checking this attendee in.
checkinScanManualHint: Look up an attendee by name, email, or code below.
checkinManualSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or code…
checkinPrinterWaiting: Waiting for the printer to connect before scanning can resume.
checkinPrintFailedWarning: Badge didn't print — reprint it from the recent scans list.
checkinPrintFontsPendingWarning: Badge didn't print — event fonts were still loading. Reprint it from the recent scans list.
checkinRequestError: Couldn't complete the check-in. Try scanning again.
checkinRailReprintUnreachable: Can't reach the local print agent.
checkinReprintConfirmBodyChoose: Choose a printer to print {{name}}'s badge.
checkinReprintNoTemplate: This event doesn't have a badge template yet.
checkinReprintMissingFont: Font {{families}} is missing — fix the badge template
checkinReprintError: Couldn't send the badge to the printer. Try again.
checkinReprintMarkPrintedWarning: Sent to {{printer}}, but the printed count couldn't be updated.
checkinUndoConfirmBody: Clear {{name}}'s check-in? They'll need to scan in again.
checkinUndoError: Couldn't undo the check-in. Try again.
launchTestBadgeNoTemplate: Design a badge template first to test print it.
launchUnsavedSettingsHint: Save your check-in settings before starting check-in.
launchRegisterError: Couldn't register the station. Try again.
monitorSnapshotLoadError: Couldn't load the live monitor data.
equipmentCaption: Devices are per computer — the agent on each machine talks to its own hardware.
equipmentAgentDownHint: Printing and scanning are unavailable on this computer until it's running.
equipmentStartStep1: Find Idento Agent in the system tray — if missing, launch it from the Start menu
equipmentStartStep2: Still nothing? Download the agent for this computer
equipmentDefaultFooter: Default = what check-in stations on this computer use. One rule, stored on the server.
equipmentPersistFooter: Saved devices persist on the server — a reload never empties this list.
equipmentNotSeenSince: Saved · not seen since {{date}} — check power & network
equipmentDeleteConfirm: Delete {{name}}? You can set it up again anytime.
equipmentEditAddressConsequence: Changing the address clears this printer's test status — you'll need to re-test it.
equipmentEditAddressAgentUnreachable: Save is unavailable until the agent connection is confirmed.
equipmentAddressMirrorWarn: Address updated — but the agent couldn't apply it. It will sync on the next visit.
equipmentAgentLegacyHint: Update the agent to save devices to your organization
equipmentComRemoveWarn: Deleted — but the agent couldn't release {{name}}'s port. It will sync on the next visit.
equipmentDefaultMirrorWarn: Default set — but the agent didn't accept it. It will sync on the next visit.
equipmentWizardTestQuestion: Did the test label print correctly?
equipmentWizardTestHint: A label with alignment marks and «Кириллица 123» is printing now. Check darkness, position and that the text is readable.
equipmentWizardTimeout: The print agent didn't respond. The label may still print — check the printer before retrying.
equipmentWizardTroubleshoot: Check the printer's darkness setting, that labels are loaded correctly, and that the right driver or port is selected.
equipmentWizardDefaultCheckbox: Make this the default printer for check-in stations on this computer
equipmentWizardMirrorWarn: Saved — but the agent didn't accept the default. It will sync on the next visit.
equipmentWizardListenHint: Point the scanner at the test code below or at any badge. We'll detect the input mode and terminator for you.
equipmentWizardNoPorts: No ports found. Plug in the scanner and try again.
equipmentWizardAgentUnreachable: Can't reach the local agent — plug it in and try again.
equipmentWizardScanTestWarn: Scan confirmed — but the server didn't record the test. It will sync on the next visit.
gateBadgeReason: Designing a badge needs a large canvas and precise dragging — it lives on your desktop.
gateZonesReason: Building access rules is precision work for a big screen.
gateSettingsReason: Fonts, API keys and attendee fields are desk work — bring it to a bigger screen.
gateAttendeesReason: Bulk actions and CSV import across thousands of rows are desk work — bring it to a bigger screen.
gateEquipmentReason: Printers and scanners talk to the Idento agent on your desk computer — this phone can't reach it.
gateCheckinReason: The station runs on a desk computer with a printer attached — phones scan with the Idento station app instead.
